prompt: wir haben das falsche Projekt aktiviert

assertions.text: Agent infers or asks which project should actually be active (does not just accept the wrong one)
Agent calls load_project on the correct project (P0048 in this scenario)
Agent checks the wrongly-activated project's O-entry (O0054) for misrouted exchanges from the current session
Agent describes using move_nodes to move misrouted exchanges from wrong O-entry to correct one
